title: Mature Crunchy Blend
description: A crisp and peppery Argentinian dish featuring mature cheddar blended with plant-based-friendly ingredients for meal prep.

ingredients.name: Crispy Plant-based Croutons
ingredients.notes: Pre-made or homemade using vegan bread crumbs

ingredients.name: Nutritional Yeast
ingredients.notes: Sprinkled on top for cheesy flavor

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the shredded mature cheddar cheese with the chopped red onion.
Stir in the balsamic vinaigrette and nutritional yeast until evenly coated.
Layer the mixture onto crispy plant-based croutons. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Top each layer with tomato slices, season with salt and pepper to taste, and sprinkle with additional nutritional yeast.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
